communication_boundary: The answer must cite exact records without inventing IDs.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo release request S7-019 names item I19 and window W19.
Approval APP-S7-019 names item I19 and window W19.
Checklist CHK-S7-019 names item I19 and has step A complete, step B complete, and step C complete.
Owner record OWN-S7-019 names item I19 and owner O19.
Log record LOG-S7-019 names item I19 and window W19.
Release requires matching request, approval, checklist, owner, and log records.
